summary: Comprehensive testing of Event Fine Type feature. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All fine type dropdown features working correctly in EventDialog and EventDetailDialog.

issues: Hydration warnings about <span> inside <option>/<select> elements - cosmetic issue from fiscal year selector, no functional impact

seed_data_creation: Test events and fine types created and cleaned up automatically via pytest and manual cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event Fine Type feature fully tested. Key tests: 1) POST /api/events with fine_type_id creates event with correct fine_amount and fine_enabled=True, 2) POST /api/events without fine_type_id creates event with fine_amount=0 and fine_enabled=False, 3) POST /api/events with invalid fine_type_id returns 404, 4) PUT /api/events/{id} with fine_type_id updates fine_amount from fine type, 5) PUT /api/events/{id}/fine-toggle with fine_type_id activates fine, 6) PUT /api/events/{id}/fine-toggle without body deactivates fine, 7) EventDialog.js shows 'Strafenart bei Nichtabsage (optional)' dropdown with fine types, 8) EventDetailDialog.js toggle fine shows fine type select dropdown when activating, 9) EventDetailDialog.js can deactivate fine for events with fine enabled.

backend: POST /api/events with fine_type_id - creates event with correct fine_amount and fine_enabled=True - PASSED
POST /api/events without fine_type_id - creates event with fine_amount=0 and fine_enabled=False - PASSED
POST /api/events with invalid fine_type_id - returns 404 - PASSED
PUT /api/events/{id} with fine_type_id - updates fine_amount from fine type - PASSED
PUT /api/events/{id} with invalid fine_type_id - returns 404 - PASSED
PUT /api/events/{id}/fine-toggle with fine_type_id - activates fine - PASSED
PUT /api/events/{id}/fine-toggle without body - deactivates fine - PASSED
PUT /api/events/{id}/fine-toggle without fine_type_id when activating - returns 400/422 - PASSED
PUT /api/events/{id}/fine-toggle with invalid fine_type_id - returns 404 - PASSED
GET /api/fine-types - returns list of fine types - PASSED
frontend: EventDialog.js shows 'Strafenart bei Nichtabsage (optional)' dropdown - PASSED
EventDialog.js dropdown lists predefined fine types with labels and amounts - PASSED
Creating a new event with a selected fine type sends fine_type_id to backend - PASSED
Creating a new event with 'Keine Strafe' sends null fine_type_id - PASSED
EventDetailDialog.js shows 'Strafe zuweisen' button for events without fine - PASSED
EventDetailDialog.js toggle fine shows fine type select dropdown when activating - PASSED
EventDetailDialog.js shows 'Strafe deaktivieren' button for events with fine enabled - PASSED
EventDetailDialog.js can deactivate fine for events with fine enabled - PASSED
Fine type dropdown filters out event-specific fine types (only shows predefined) - PASSED
Toast messages show correct feedback for fine activation/deactivation - PASSED

bug_fix_applied.issue: EventFineAssign model had fine_type_id as required field, causing 422 error when deactivating fine with empty body
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed fine_type_id from 'str' to 'Optional[str] = None' to allow empty body for deactivation

notes.fine_type_dropdown: EventDialog.js filters fine types to exclude event-specific ones (ft.event_id check)
notes.fine_toggle_flow: When activating fine, user must select a fine type from dropdown. When deactivating, no selection needed.
notes.fine_amount_source: fine_amount is always derived from the selected fine_type's amount, not manually entered
